column1: 2pm update: Debby now moving at 13 mph. Next track update at 5pm. We are updating live on ABC Action News right now.

Clearwater Beach
The tide has since receded a foot

Thanks Denis, Shay and everyone keeping us informed about what's going on! You have brought me a lot of relief! As a person who suffers from anxiety and PTSD thanks to Hurricane Andrew, that means a bunch!;
Non stop rain and gusty winds since this a.m. in Sarasota. I'm ready for this to be over and I'm sure my dog would like a walk as well.
We are on Siesta Key and it has not stopped since this AM. So much for the storm being out west....bands over us all day and no letting up in sight here. Everything is flooded.

P.S. We have a pet door in our back door, but in a tropical storm like this, water pools up on the back hex-block patio right where the pet door is, so it's kind of a huuuuuuuuuuge puddle that my dog prefers to avoid, so I took him out on a leash, via the front door. Like I said, we only went to the end of the block and back, and it was wild and woolly. 😮

I just took mine (my dog, that is) out between bands here in St. Petersburg. Or, not really between, per se, but during what initially seemed like a slight break in the intensity of the rain. However, when we got to the end of our very own block, the rain changed back from light to intense, and the wind was whipping again, so we high-tailed it back to the house. But he did get to go #1, so mission accomplished.
I keep an eye on it constantly. She will use a pee pad if desperate and no way she's going out in torrent.
Rain and wind beginning in Dunnellon.
Great birthday present for the US Coast Guard. 234 years old today. What better way to celebrate in Florida than with a tropical storm.

Fishhawk here. Steady rain, little to no wind, ponding of water in the usual places, Starbucks open (yay). Momma Muscovy duck with her 20+ babies swimming in the retention pond and the Sandhill crane parents have their twins out foraging for snacks.
Sounds like such a lovely day 🙂

Stopped raining in Zephyrhills for now ... more to come no doubt ... just chilling and waiting it out
#Rule7
Rain in Lakeland, nothing out of the ordinary
lifelong tampa resident here: i stocked up on all the hurricane essentials. i've got plenty of rum and snacks.
yup prepared af.
Thank you for keeping us informed!
Seems like it drifted a little more east today
Wobbles east and west have been seen today. It’s going to stay well west of Tampa bay
That's what I was thinking
I agree I noticed that earlier this afternoon.
yeah right into my front lawn LOL

i’m in clearwater, are these rain bands we’ve been getting what we’re expected to continue getting, or is there worse on the way? it doesn’t seem as bad as my anxiety was telling me, but i don’t know how much worse things could get depending on how far the storm is away from us!
brooksville getting rain and wind but got power so we are good
Rain in St Pete slight wind
Largo here. The wind is getting kind of real with some big gusts. Rain comes and goes, streets where I live are draining just fine.
there are some roads in that neighborhood between Belcher & Starkey that the roads flood under regular rain. drains fairly quick tho
Is 13 mph faster or slower than it has been?
I think the same.
Are flights coming into PIE today? Supposed to be flying from Asheville to PIE at 7 pm
Yes I am wondering if flights will be going out this evening.
I have clients trying to get home today and their flights are just being delayed over and over.

I can tell you we got at PIE today around 10:30 A.M to pick up my MIL. Her flight was left in the air from 9:40 A.M until almost 11 where they redirected the flight to Sanford Orlando. We have been sitting in the cell parking lot since we got here waiting for updates. They decided around 12:30 they were going to send the plane back to PIE, they have boarded the plane and the plane still has not left Sanford Orlando…
I just wouldn’t fly in at this point if I were you. It’s not worth the headache and possibly derailment.
Oh yeah I’ve seen 7 flights leave now throughout the day. They just wont land anyone here.
did you try calling the airline 🤷🏻‍♀️
been on hold for 20 mins trying to get thru 😓
if I were you, I would continue to hold. Relying on social media to get a correct answer is not the way to go.
check their website
We are in North Redington Beach. The ocean is angry today as expected but it is beautiful! We’ve had a little bit of rain and wind, but ok so far 😊
What's it like in Clearwater near Drew st. I have a kiddo working till 9:30 pm he has travel 1 hr North in 19 to get home
we're off Drew and Hampton road. Windy and rain.
mild rain off & on. No big deal

tomorrow around that time, the storm will be worse and covering almost all of Northern Florida/Southeast Georgia. Unless your flight flies around the storm, over the Gulf… you may be delayed or canceled.

there is potential Ernesto and I have heard there is a third wave but no one is talking about these two. Ernesto estimated for this coming weekend. Geez! Can't finish one panic before the new ones. Let's hope we get a lull between back to back tropical systems.

lol gotta love electric seats
all I can think is after Irma? when we were out for 4 days bc a line snapped in the nature preserve (after the hurricane) and they had to bring in amphibious equipment to fix it!!!!
right ! At my age 61 I might break a hip getting out 🤣

I know! After it was over I remember sitting and saying at least we still had power - then it was off! We still have power in Starke so if it gets too hot we might head up there - y’all are welcome to come!
us too
